summary: Extra Innings subscriber FGotD archive - Feed Select
description:
Given the user is an Xtra Innings subscriber
AND the FGotD is archived
AND the FGotD is not in the subscribers viewing market

steps.action: WHEN a user selects the archived FGotD game tile
steps.result:
THEN buttons for Recap and Condensed Game display center justified, above the team feeds
AND the user will see feed buttons for both teams
AND the user achieves playback after selecting each button
